tagline: Licensed Class II residential electricians serving Conyers, GA — panel upgrades, rewiring, and same-day power restoration done right the first time.

services.title: Panel Upgrades & Rewiring
services.desc: Service-panel replacements and whole-home rewiring to bring older Conyers homes up to safe, modern electrical code.

services.title: Outlet, Switch & Lighting Installation
services.desc: GFCI outlet rewiring, switch repair, and lighting fixture installation handled cleanly and explained start to finish.

services.title: Troubleshooting & Power Restoration
services.desc: Fast residential diagnostics, smoke/CO alarm installation, and power-restoration work from a licensed Class II contractor.

about_paragraph: Elite Electric Solutions is a licensed Class II residential electrical contractor based right here in Conyers, Georgia. From panel upgrades and whole-home rewiring to outlet repairs, lighting installs, and fast power restoration, we treat every home as if it were our own — clean work, code-compliant results, and honest answers from the first call to the final inspection.
review_count_note: 5.0 rating from 161 reviews — verified across Birdeye and Best Pros In Town aggregator listings.
